description: A sliding carousel of dated press release items with previous/next navigation controls. Each slide displays a date and linked headline.

layout.slidesVisible: 1 slide visible at a time (3 total)

FR-01.title: Section Heading
FR-01.description: The carousel MUST display a section heading ('Press Releases') above the carousel area.
acceptance: H2 heading rendered in Roboto Regular, 700 weight
Heading followed by a horizontal separator line

FR-02.title: Carousel Navigation Controls
FR-02.description: Previous and Next navigation buttons MUST be provided to cycle through slides.
acceptance: Previous button labeled 'Go to last slide'
Disabled state when at first/last slide

FR-03.title: Slide Content Structure
FR-03.description: Each slide MUST display a dated press release item with a linked headline.
acceptance: Date displayed in a label format (e.g., 'April 8, 2026')
Headline as a paragraph element, linked to the full press release
Link opens to external news.abbvie.com domain

FR-04.title: Slide Grouping
FR-04.description: Slides MUST be grouped and announce position (e.g., '1 of 3').
acceptance: ARIA group role with label indicating position

FR-05.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-05.description: Carousel MUST function at all viewport sizes.
acceptance: Mobile: Same carousel behavior, touch swipe supported
Controls remain accessible at all breakpoints

accessibility.AC-01: Carousel region MUST have an accessible name
accessibility.AC-02: Navigation buttons MUST have descriptive labels
accessibility.AC-03: Current slide position MUST be announced to screen readers
accessibility.AC-04: Auto-rotation MUST NOT be enabled (user-controlled only)
accessibility.AC-05: Keyboard navigation: arrow keys cycle slides, Enter/Space activates links
